content_en:
Al-Insaf fi Ma'rifat ar-Rajih min al-Khilaf ('The Equity in Knowing the Preponderant Position from the Scholarly Disagreements') is the most important work on internal Hanbali legal disputes and one of the most valuable reference works in Islamic jurisprudence for anyone seeking to understand how the Hanbali school resolved its internal scholarly differences. Its author, 'Ala' ad-Din Abu al-Hasan 'Ali ibn Sulayman al-Mardawi (817–885 AH / 1414–1480 CE), was one of the most learned Hanbali scholars of the ninth century AH and is considered the authoritative resolver (murajjih) of disputed points within the Hanbali school.

Al-Mardawi composed Al-Insaf as a commentary and completion of al-Muqni' by Ibn Qudamah, integrating into it all the views expressed in the major Hanbali works up to his time — particularly Al-Mughni (Ibn Qudamah), Al-Furu' (Ibn Muflih), and Al-Insiraf (Ibn Qundus) — and then judging which opinion is the most preponderant (rajih) based on the strength of evidence and the weight of scholarly consensus within the school.

The great value of Al-Insaf is that it provides a reliable map of the Hanbali school's internal landscape. For virtually every significant legal question, al-Mardawi presents: the different opinions within the school, their evidential bases, the scholars who held each view, and then — crucially — his own assessment of which opinion is the rajih (preponderant). His judgments became definitive for the school and are cited by Hanbali scholars to this day when determining the mu'tamad (operative) position.

Al-Mardawi was born in Mardah in present-day Syria and studied under the major Hanbali authorities of his age. He spent much of his career in Damascus and became a judge (qadi) there. His scholarly output beyond Al-Insaf includes Tashih al-Furu' (a companion work clarifying disputes in Ibn Muflih's Al-Furu') and Al-Tahbir Sharh al-Tahrir (on usul al-fiqh). Together these works established al-Mardawi as the definitive arbiter of Hanbali legal positions in the pre-modern period.

The significance of Al-Insaf for Islamic scholarship extends beyond the Hanbali school. It is a masterwork of comparative jurisprudence within a single school — demonstrating how a mature legal school handles its own internal diversity, resolves apparent contradictions in its transmitted positions, and maintains coherence while permitting scholarly development. Understanding this process provides important insight into how Islamic legal traditions evolve.

For scholars and advanced students of Hanbali fiqh, Al-Insaf is an indispensable reference. Works like Zad al-Mustaqni' and al-Muqni' present the ruling; Al-Insaf explains why that ruling was chosen over the alternatives within the school.
content_id:
Al-Inshaf fi Ma'rifati ar-Rajih min al-Khilaf ('Keadilan dalam Mengetahui Pendapat yang Unggul dari Perbedaan-Perbedaan Ulama') adalah karya terpenting tentang perselisihan hukum internal madzhab Hanbali dan salah satu karya referensi paling berharga dalam fiqh Islam bagi siapa pun yang ingin memahami bagaimana madzhab Hanbali menyelesaikan perbedaan-perbedaan ilmiah internalnya. Pengarangnya, 'Ala' ad-Din Abu al-Hasan 'Ali ibn Sulayman al-Mardawi (817–885 H / 1414–1480 M), adalah salah satu ulama Hanbali paling berpengetahuan pada abad kesembilan Hijriah dan dianggap sebagai penyelesai (murajjih) yang otoritatif atas poin-poin yang diperdebatkan dalam madzhab Hanbali.

Al-Mardawi menyusun Al-Inshaf sebagai komentar dan pelengkap atas Al-Muqni' karya Ibn Qudamah, mengintegrasikan ke dalamnya semua pandangan yang diungkapkan dalam karya-karya Hanbali besar hingga masanya — khususnya Al-Mughni (Ibn Qudamah), Al-Furu' (Ibn Muflih), dan Al-Insiraf (Ibn Qundus) — dan kemudian menghakimi pendapat mana yang paling unggul (rajih) berdasarkan kekuatan bukti dan bobot konsensus ulama dalam madzhab.

Nilai besar Al-Inshaf adalah bahwa ia memberikan peta yang dapat diandalkan tentang lanskap internal madzhab Hanbali. Untuk hampir setiap pertanyaan hukum yang signifikan, al-Mardawi menyajikan: pendapat-pendapat berbeda dalam madzhab, dasar-dasar evidensialnya, ulama-ulama yang memegang masing-masing pandangan, dan kemudian — yang terpenting — penilaiannya sendiri tentang pendapat mana yang rajih (unggul). Penilaiannya menjadi definitif bagi madzhab dan masih dikutip oleh ulama-ulama Hanbali hingga hari ini ketika menentukan posisi mu'tamad (operatif).

Al-Mardawi lahir di Mardah di Suriah saat ini dan belajar di bawah otoritas-otoritas Hanbali besar pada zamannya. Beliau menghabiskan sebagian besar kariernya di Damaskus dan menjadi hakim (qadhi) di sana. Karya ilmiahnya selain Al-Inshaf mencakup Tashih al-Furu' (sebuah karya pendamping yang mengklarifikasi perselisihan dalam Al-Furu' karya Ibn Muflih) dan Al-Tahbir Syarh al-Tahrir (tentang ushul fiqh). Bersama-sama karya-karya ini menjadikan al-Mardawi sebagai arbiter definitif posisi hukum Hanbali pada periode pra-modern.

Signifikansi Al-Inshaf bagi beasiswa Islam melampaui madzhab Hanbali. Ini adalah mahakarya fiqh perbandingan dalam satu madzhab — mendemonstrasikan bagaimana madzhab hukum yang matang menangani keragaman internalnya sendiri, menyelesaikan kontradiksi yang tampak dalam posisi-posisi yang diteruskannya, dan mempertahankan koherensi sembari memungkinkan perkembangan ilmiah. Memahami proses ini memberikan wawasan penting tentang bagaimana transmisi hukum Islam benar-benar bekerja — bukan sebagai penerapan mekanis dari aturan-aturan yang ditetapkan, melainkan sebagai proses penilaian ilmiah yang berkelanjutan tentang bukti dan penalaran.
